gloss:
Statement of record: `Eidometry.Thesis.engine_computes_forced` (Eidometry thesis, section Executed runs).

The partition an executable program computes is, by definition, the bisimilarity relation determined by its observations and action-labeled transitions. The runnable engine and the mathematical definition are one declaration, not two objects kept in sync.

Discharged by [MTH.R-2026-1207].

statement.pretty: ∀ {S : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype S] [inst_1 : DecidableEq S] {V : Type u_2} [inst_2 : DecidableEq V] {A : Type u_3} [inst_3 : Fintype A] {Q : Type u_4} [inst_4 : DecidableEq Q] [inst_5 : AddCommMonoid Q] (P : WMSpec.Compiler.EidProgram S V A Q), WMSpec.Compiler.EidProgram.quotient P = WMSpec.Compiler.causalRel (WMSpec.Compiler.EidProgram.reads P) (WMSpec.Compiler.EidProgram.words P)

title: Eidometry.Thesis.engine_computes_forced
